AdvancedBuildingControl.Randomize.Toolti: Randomize the building's seed to change billboard sizes/positions, trees, props and colors. Randomizing is irreversible.
AdvancedBuildingControl.Brand.SupportedB: The following brands supports the current company.
AdvancedBuildingControl.Brand.OtherBrand: The following brands are from companies that's not the same as the current company. Selecting any of these will not have any effect on the business/simulation either.
AdvancedBuildingControl.Brand.Info: Changing brand is completely visual only. It does not affect simulation and does not change the company or the resources used/manufactured.

AdvancedBuildingControl.Component.Applie: Any changes made in this panel applies to all instance of this prefab.

AdvancedBuildingControl.StarQ_Option.Cit: Backup all custom Property Customizer values made in this city.
Select one of the existing backups to restore in current city.
Clear any existing and restore custom Property Customizer values from selected backup.
Restore all custom component override to values before changes.
AdvancedBuildingControl.StarQ_Option.Del: Delete local Static Ploppable cache JSON

Delete the StaticPloppableBuilder.json file which is used to check which Static Ploppables need to be rebuilt on game load. Using this often will result in longer loading time as the mod will rescan for missing buildings to recreate on game load.
AdvancedBuildingControl.ReloadSave: Missing Static Ploppables recreated. Please reload the save before continuing.
